W.label: a window looking out at the mess hall porch and the path to Cabin Sturgeon

b.label: a bench along the table · press space to sit and eat (advances time)

K.label: the kitchen · you can smell soup

B.label: the bulletin board · pinned notes · press space to read

notes: The mess hall interior · three tables with benches, the kitchen along the west wall, a bulletin board on the east wall (holds the Mrs. Wu's Garden flier, the tide chart, the daily schedule, and various cross-Oneironautics lore fliers per the design doc).  The door out is south wall center.
